pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new runtime environment.
Add the core Spring Boot starter dependency to the project.
Add Spring Data JPA starter to enable database persistence capabilities.
Add Spring Boot test starter for unit and integration testing support.
Add Spring Security test module for security-related testing utilities.
Add Liquibase core library for database migration management.
Add H2 in-memory database driver for testing purposes.
Add MapStruct library for type-safe bean mapping.
Add MapStruct processor for annotation processing during compilation.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use Java 21 source/target and register Lombok and MapStruct as annotation processors.
Add JaCoCo Maven plugin to generate code coverage reports during the test phase.
Configure Surefire plugin with JVM arguments to enable dynamic agent loading, required for modern Java instrumentation.

src/main/resources/application.yaml.general_idea: Configure Spring Boot datasource properties to connect to a PostgreSQL database using environment variables.
Configure JPA settings to disable open-in-view and defer datasource initialization.
Enable Liquibase for database migrations with a specific changelog and drop-first strategy.
Disable the Spring Boot startup banner for cleaner console output.
